title: Husk-carrier
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Husk-carriers''' were [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creatures used to carry corpses. [[Anakin Solo]] was carried in a husk-carrier.

It is unknown what became of the husk-carriers after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]] ended; though it can be assumed they were transplanted on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] where they would have joined the [[tampasi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
